permits.description:
CHANGE A 2 TO 1 FAMILY:
kitchen renovation: Remove cabinets, appliances & countertops, demo walls & ceilings to studs, demo partition wall, new layout, replace rotted wood, insulate, update electrical & plumbing, close walls, skim coat, new cabinets, counter tops, appliances, remove linoleum and refinish hardwood or replace w/ new. paint
permits.score_reasons: keyword: renovation; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: Substantial kitchen renovation with 1-2 family conversion suggests active preparation, but owner occupancy and single permit lower likelihood compared to full property overhaul or owner-non-occupied projects.
